title: PlanStep
description: A single step within a Plan (agency/capabilities/develop/_main.py; Spec 287). Linked via HAS_STEP←Plan; index establishes ordering; state tracks execution outcome.

plan.description: Node ID of the parent Plan.

index.description: Zero-based position of this step within the plan.

state.description: Optional execution state of the step.

evidence.description: Optional evidence or output produced when the step was completed.
